rag_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks only in valid component or implementation scopes
Place component type annexes in component types and implementation annexes in component implementations
Use visible identifiers from the current target component or implementation
Avoid subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks in the most specific valid scope for the current requirement
Use only visible identifiers from the current target component or implementation
Avoid assumptions and guarantees that refer to subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes after relevant subcomponents and connections
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports in implementation annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit exposure
